title: Trolling Mod
description: This mod adds a Troll Menu that you can have fun on with your friends!
body:
Troll Menu is a playful Fabric mod that adds an in‑game prank menu for chaotic fun with friends, Open a clean GUI, pick a target, and trigger silly (but memorable) effects like TNT rings, launchers,
  lightning scares, inventory pranks, and more. Designed for multiplayer fun and single‑player testing alike, its an easy way to spice up sessions without heavy setup.
